questions.q: What was the main concern of the United States during the Cold War?
questions.explanation: The Cold War was a decades-long rivalry centered on the spread of communism.

questions.q: What did the Civil Rights Movement work to end?
questions.explanation: It sought to end segregation and secure equal rights and voting rights.

questions.q: Who was a key leader of the Civil Rights Movement?
questions.explanation: Dr. King led much of the movement through nonviolent protest.

questions.q: Which 1954 Supreme Court case ruled segregated public schools unconstitutional?
questions.explanation: Brown v. Board of Education struck down 'separate but equal' in schools.

questions.q: Around what year did the Cold War end with the collapse of the Soviet Union?
questions.explanation: The Soviet Union collapsed around 1991, ending the Cold War.

questions.q: What major event happened on September 11, 2001?
questions.explanation: Terrorists hijacked planes and attacked the U.S., leading to the War on Terror.
